pi_items.source: Confirmed from PROJECT_DIR variable in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
Counted the length of EXPECTED_CONSENSUS string 'GAGTTTTATCGCTTCCATGACGCAGAAGTTAACACTTTCGGATATTTCTGATGAGTCGAAAAATTATCTTGATAAAGCAGGAATTACTACTGCTTGTTTA' generated in export_result.sh.
Confirmed threshold in verifier.py logic where `passed = score >= 90`.
Confirmed from injected bugs in setup_task.sh: io.py misses the last yield, sequence.py misses [::-1], and overlap.py duplicates overlap instead of slicing seq2.

privileged_info_summary: The task is performed in /home/ga/PycharmProjects/genome_assembler. The expected length of the fully assembled consensus sequence is 100 base pairs. A minimum score of 90 is required to pass the test suite and validation. The three injected bugs that the agent must fix are in assembler/io.py within read_fasta (dropping the last sequence), assembler/sequence.py within reverse_complement (missing string reversal), and assembler/overlap.py within merge_sequences (duplicating the overlapped region).
